allow: PowerShell('node','npm','npx','py','python','python3','php','ruby','dotnet','deno','bun' | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Command $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($p\){ "$_ : $\($p.Source\)" } else { "$_ : MISSING" } })

PowerShell(foreach \($c in 'node','npm','vercel'\) { $p = \(Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($p\) { "$c -> $\($p.Source\)" } else { "$c -> NOT INSTALLED" } }; "---"; if \(Test-Path .vercel\) { ".vercel folder exists \(project linked\)" } else { ".vercel folder MISSING \(not linked yet\)" })
PowerShell($w = Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($w\) { "winget available: $\($w.Source\)" } else { "winget NOT available" })

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); $n = Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($n\) { "node $\(node --version\) at $\($n.Source\)"; "npm $\(npm --version\)" } else { "node still not on PATH - check C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" })

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); npm install -g vercel 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5; "---"; $env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); \(Get-Command vercel -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

PowerShell($cur = Get-ExecutionPolicy -Scope CurrentUser; "Current CurrentUser policy: $cur"; if \($cur -ne 'RemoteSigned' -and $cur -ne 'Unrestricted' -and $cur -ne 'Bypass'\) { Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope CurrentUser RemoteSigned -Force; "Set CurrentUser policy to RemoteSigned" } else { "Policy already allows scripts" })
